subtitle: Senior Director, Experience Acceleration -- CCaaS Platform | AI-Native Enablement | Solutions Consulting
summary_text: Technology executive with 14 years of enterprise leadership and deep CCaaS platform expertise — uniquely positioned as both an enterprise buyer who has run contact center transformations at scale and a consultant who now evaluates and compares AI-native CCaaS solutions for national CX firms. Built evaluation frameworks for Genesys- and NICE-level platforms. Led a zero-downtime enterprise contact center transformation integrating intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching, and knowledge systems. Directed 35+ person technology organizations with multi-year roadmaps, global vendor alignment, and cross-functional stakeholder governance. Hands-on with Claude and CoPilot; published thinking on AI adoption, demo-stage AI/automation distinction, and enterprise readiness.

bullets: Built AI architecture evaluation framework for a national CX consulting firm -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, and structured evaluation flow for comparing Genesys- and NICE-level CCaaS platforms down to AI-native startups; framework adopted and used in active client engagements.

Designed repeatable methodology to assess AI/CCaaS platforms across integration depth, native AI capability, third-party extensibility, and enterprise suitability -- directly applicable to demo environment strategy and SC enablement.
Deliver solution architecture guidance and pre-sales technical assessments to support AI platform evaluation and vendor selection for contact center environments.

Led enterprise-wide contact center and communications platform transformation: directed solution design, multi-channel integration, AI-assisted routing and coaching, internal and external knowledge systems -- zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Owned product roadmap and strategic prioritization for MMI's homegrown enterprise platform over 8 years, directing a 45-50 person delivery org across BA, QA, and development with 12+ cross-level business stakeholders; operated a multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x dept-equity).

Built and led technology organizations of 35+ direct / 75+ extended staff with $15M+ annual operating budget; sustained highest employee retention and satisfaction results across the organization for 14 years.
Doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% year-over-year through Agile SDLC transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprint cadence).
Directed digital transformation delivering 200%+ SEO and digital acquisition improvement; complete rebuild of web properties, mobile applications, and operational analytics.
Maintained 100% audited PCI-DSS certification across multiple years; full HIPAA and CARD Act compliance across nationally distributed operations.
Founded and scaled a web development and IT consulting firm over 17 years with full P&L ownership; peak ~12 employees, peak revenue $4-5M.

Delivered client-facing technical platforms and digital experiences across dozens of enterprise and content-driven clients -- built and sold the technical product, the roadmap, and the implementation.
